items.summary: Create a new Conspectus and its initial schedule (slot A).
items.label: POST /api/v1/conspectuses  ·  conspectus / createConspectus

items.summary: Return conspectuses whose next review is due.
items.label: GET /api/v1/conspectuses/due  ·  conspectus / listDueConspectuses

items.summary: Look up a single Conspectus by uuid.
items.label: GET /api/v1/conspectuses/{conspectus_uuid}  ·  conspectus / getConspectusById

items.summary: Partial content update on an existing Conspectus.
items.label: PATCH /api/v1/conspectuses/{conspectus_uuid}  ·  conspectus / patchConspectus

items.summary: Record a review outcome and advance the schedule.
items.label: POST /api/v1/conspectuses/{conspectus_uuid}/actions/review  ·  conspectus / reviewConspectus

items.summary: Return the immutable audit log of a Conspectus (reviews + content patches).
items.label: GET /api/v1/conspectuses/{conspectus_uuid}/history  ·  conspectus / getConspectusHistory

items.summary: List a learner's error log entries (optionally filtered by conspectus).
items.label: GET /api/v1/errors  ·  error-log / listErrorLogs

items.summary: Append an error log entry for a learner (optionally linked to a conspectus or review).
items.label: POST /api/v1/errors  ·  error-log / createErrorLog

items.summary: Recap of the previous day's review activity.
items.label: GET /api/v1/me/yesterday  ·  me / getMeYesterday

items.summary: Per-day review counts for the trailing N days (heat-map source).
items.label: GET /api/v1/schedule/history  ·  schedule / getScheduleHistory

items.summary: Return a server-shuffled lookahead of due conspectuses (evening-review shape).
items.label: GET /api/v1/schedule/preview  ·  schedule / getSchedulePreview

items.summary: Aggregated study-load counts for a learner (by slot + due-now + due next 24h).
items.label: GET /api/v1/schedule/summary  ·  schedule / getScheduleSummary

items.summary: Get user by system_uuid and system_user_id.
items.label: GET /api/v1/user/{system_uuid}/{system_user_id}  ·  user / getUserBySystemUserId

items.summary: Partial update of user profile fields.
items.label: PATCH /api/v1/user/{system_uuid}/{system_user_id}  ·  user / patchUserBySystemUserId

items.summary: Full replacement of mutable user profile fields.
items.label: PUT /api/v1/user/{system_uuid}/{system_user_id}  ·  user / updateUserBySystemUserId
